# Communis — The Operating System for Worker Cooperatives
# https://communis.coop

> Communis replaces spreadsheets with relationship memory, cooperative intelligence, and narrative-first tools for worker-owned businesses. Built on CROS (Communal Relationship Operating System) with NRI (Narrative Relational Intelligence).

Website: https://communis.coop
Contact: https://communis.coop/contact
Demo: https://communis.coop/demo

## What Communis Does

Communis is a cooperative management platform serving the ~1,300 worker cooperatives in the United States. It provides:

- **Internal Capital Account (ICA) tracking** — member equity, buy-in contributions, patronage allocations, revolvement schedules
- **Patronage distribution engine** — surplus allocation by hours/revenue/equal, Subchapter T compliance, 1099-PATR generation
- **Democratic governance** — proposals, voting (majority/supermajority/consensus/consent), rehearsal votes for practice
- **Stripe Connect payments** — buy-in collection, recurring dues, patronage payouts directly to member bank accounts
- **Document intelligence** — Google Drive/Dropbox sync, NRI reads bylaws/policies/minutes and answers member questions
- **Communio knowledge hub** — anonymized cross-cooperative knowledge sharing, real operational insights from real co-ops
- **NRI Compass** — role-scoped AI assistant that answers questions from the co-op's actual data and documents
- **Cooperative education** — plain-language glossary, rehearsal votes, knowledge base, curated library, milestone celebrations
- **QuickBooks/Xero integration** — financial transparency dashboards synced from accounting, patronage journal entries written back
- **Committee management** — meeting schedules, term tracking, rotation fairness scoring

## Pricing

Two tiers, same features:
- **Communis** — $49/mo (free for co-ops with ≤5 members). All features included.
- **Communis + Payments** — $49/mo + 0.5% per transaction. Adds Stripe Connect for buy-ins, dues, and patronage payouts.

## Key Pages

- / — Homepage
- /features — All features across 8 categories
- /pricing — Two-tier pricing with Stripe Connect explanation
- /map — Interactive US map with 408 geocoded cooperatives
- /manifesto — Cooperative history and CROS philosophy
- /open-source — Tech stack breakdown
- /contact — Get in touch / Sign up
- /demo — Interactive demo with role switcher (5 roles)

## App Demo Pages

- /app — Dashboard with NRI signals and equity overview
- /app/members — Member roster with status and equity
- /app/members/:id — Individual member story with narrative equity summary
- /app/governance — Democratic proposals and voting
- /app/patronage — Surplus distribution with tax compliance
- /app/committees — Committee management and rotation fairness
- /app/payments — Stripe Connect dashboard (buy-ins, dues, payouts)
- /app/integrations — QuickBooks financial dashboard
- /app/documents — Document library with NRI learning
- /app/communio — Cross-cooperative knowledge hub
- /app/rehearsal — Practice voting with all 4 methods
- /app/glossary — 26 cooperative terms in plain language
- /app/learn — Knowledge base with structured guides
- /app/library — Curated cooperative reading list
- /app/import — CSV import with fuzzy field mapping
- /app/onboarding — Cooperative setup wizard with 8 templates

## Architecture

- Built on CROS (Communal Relationship Operating System) philosophy
- NRI (Narrative Relational Intelligence) — rule-based signal detection, AI for phrasing only
- NRI Core Loop: Recognize · Synthesize · Prioritize
- Multi-tenant with row-level security per cooperative
- Role system: Candidate → Member → Coordinator → Steward → Advisor → Gardener
- Bylaw-configurable: every co-op's rules are different, the system adapts

## Tech Stack

React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Edge Functions), Stripe Connect, Lucide Icons

## Target Market

- ~1,300 US worker cooperatives
- ~30,000 all US cooperatives
- ~378,000 global cooperatives (CICOPA)
- 2.9 million US businesses facing succession (silver tsunami)
